_comment: Connector registry for the Business Brain. status: active | needs-credentials | manual. The discover_gaps.py detector reconciles this against what is actually connected and writes connectors/STATUS.md.

connectors.name: local-files
connectors.notes: Converts pdf/csv/xlsx/md/txt to masked .md in raw/. Drop folder is the intentional channel.

connectors.name: session-capture
connectors.source: Claude Code sessions on this machine
connectors.notes: Throttled live updates + final masked report per session.

connectors.name: google-drive-briefings
connectors.credential_needed: gcloud auth (Drive scope) OR rclone remote OR Google Drive MCP
connectors.notes: Daily step currently cannot reach Drive; no auth configured.

connectors.name: ghl
connectors.credential_needed: GHL_API_TOKEN + GHL_LOCATION_ID (GHL API v2 Private Integration Token)
connectors.notes: Connector built; wired into daily pipeline; self-skips until creds are in vault .env. Writes raw/ghl-snapshot-DATE.md.

connectors.name: stripe
connectors.notes: Merchant account tied to 3423 E Baylor.

connectors.name: notion
connectors.source: Notion: master prompts, Vince memory, databases
connectors.credential_needed: NOTION_API_KEY (internal integration token) + shared db/page ids
connectors.notes: Also an output target for master-prompt sync.

connectors.name: baselane
connectors.credential_needed: none (no robust public API) - drop PDFs into drop/
connectors.notes: Statements flow in as PDFs via the local-files connector.

connectors.name: bookingkoala
connectors.extractor: TBD (API or native Google Sheets sync)
connectors.credential_needed: BookingKoala API key OR Sheets sync access

connectors.name: twilio
connectors.notes: SMS logs currently arrive as CSV via Downloads.

connectors.name: google-sheets
connectors.credential_needed: gcloud auth (Sheets scope) OR service account JSON
